page.text: 1. FOR DUCTS X-SECTION DIMENSION LESS THAN
DUCT STIFFENER AND DUCT SUPPORT GUIDE LINE
1. DIMENSION 'A" IS TO BE EQUAL LATERAL DUCT
DIM. ‘A’ IS MORE THAN 20mm, THE DIMENSION
ARE TO BE REVALIDATED BY VEDNOR.
FLUE GAS DUCT TO FLUE GAS DUCT
TYP. AIR DUCT FLANGE CONNECTION DETAIL
1. ANGLE AS PER DETAIL-C IS NOT MANDATORY FOR|2. STIFFENERS TO BE @500mm APPROXIMATELY
AND NOS OF STIFFENERS TO BE AS PER DUCT
FIXED SUPPORT DETAIL FOR VERTICAL DUCT
(4 NOS. AT 90" ALL ROUND THE DUCT)
2. PACKAGE VENDOR SHALL DEVELOP. THE INCLINED
SUPPORT DETAIL AND SUBMIT TO PMC FOR
TOP SUPPORT ARRANGEMENT OF HOT AIR DISTRIBUTION DUCT TO BURNERS
2. PACKAGE VENDOR SHALL DECIDE THE NO. OF
